nodes.name: Weight webhook
nodes.notes: POST { date: "YYYY-MM-DD", weightKg: number } with header x-cornerman-secret. Responds 200 on receipt; validation failures show up as execution errors.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.notes: Same firebaseProjectId + uid as the Strava workflow. sharedSecret must match the x-cornerman-secret header the iOS Shortcut sends.

nodes.name: Upsert weight doc
nodes.notes: PATCH on an explicit document path creates the doc if missing and overwrites it if present — idempotent upsert keyed on {uid}_{date}. Reuses the same Google API (service account) credential as the Strava workflow.
